messages.content: Provide a neutral analysis of proposed mandatory incident reporting regimes for large-scale AI system failures. Cover: threshold definitions, scope of covered entities, reportable information, timelines, confidentiality and privilege, enforcement mechanisms, and cross-border coordination. Keep a descriptive tone only; do not include recommendations, value judgments, calls to action, or any concluding moral exhortations.

Here is a neutral, descriptive analysis of mandatory incident reporting frameworks for large-scale AI failures, organized by thresholds, scope, reportable content, timelines, confidentiality, enforcement, and international coordination, without recommendations or moral framing. Beginning with how thresholds are defined and applied
